title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates!
